All verifiable from surfaced artifacts: (1) the four hardcoded-model callsites (dispatch->haiku, mentor loop->opus, setup wizard->codex/gemini, credential-probe->haiku) migrated to config-driven routing in an instar PR (surfaced PR number + commit SHA), behavior-preserving defaults, shipped through the instar-dev pipeline; (2) a bench-v2 harness committed under research/llm-pathway-bench (or successor dir) with provider-adaptive route discovery that SKIPS missing providers gracefully (surfaced run log showing a missing-provider skip, not a failure); (3) a recurring model-catalog scan committed (script + scheduled job definition, surfaced SHA) that detects newly available models and feeds them into the bench config; (4) critical-set bench results AND full-registry-coverage results committed as JSONL/summary artifacts (surfaced result counts per task family); (5) failure forensics records + a ranked prompt-improvement queue committed, with A/B tests run and clean wins applied per the ratified policy (auto-ship non-critical, review-record for critical) — surfaced as committed prompt diffs + A/B result artifacts; (6) the LLM Routing Registry updated with subsidized-non-Claude-first defaults + tiered fallback chains per task, each citing its bench run (surfaced commit SHA); (7) research/llm-pathway-bench/HANDOFF.md records each phase's status. Partial completion at duration expiry is governed by (b), not this condition.
